data.body: Implemented scan_epics_for_spec (library/CLI rebar scan-spec/gated MCP scan_spec): a batch evaluator that pulls the stores open epics, evaluates them against a spec in batches (one runner pass each, bounded cost) for coverage gaps/conflicts/overlaps via a new spec-alignment reviewer, then concatenates+ranks findings. Reuses the findings contract + runner seam. Offline test seeds 3 epics, batch_size=2 -> 2 batches via FakeRunner.
